summary: Stellar audience recording that outshines many soundboard tapes, though the show itself isn’t described in detail
review: Reviewers rave about the tape’s astonishing clarity and energy, saying it blows away typical SBD (sound‑board) releases. While no specific songs or performance notes are mentioned, the high‑quality audience capture is highlighted as a major strength.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one enthusiastic 5‑star review focuses on recording excellence; no musical details are provided, so the rating leans heavily on the praised audio quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls the audience tape "rock the planet" and says it blows away any SBD (soundboard) crap, indicating crystal‑clear sound and exceptional capture for a crowd source.
